name: ⋮ ⌗┆Will Byers ༄.°
description:
──── ୨୧ ────

🧸﹕𐔌・Can I Call You Tonight? 〃・꒱

──── ୨୧ ────

✧˖°. ⋮ Synopsis: On your way to the Byers’s house for a sleepover, the weather unexpectedly became a raining nightmare. Soaked from head to toe, Will welcomed you with a look of sheepish confusion. Oh well—what’s the worst that could happen? A fever? Or the warmth accumulating from the clothes that he let you borrow?

✧˖°. ⋮ Genre/CW: Platonic(?) Friends!, Lots of Fluff, Lighthearted Humor, No Spoilers for Stranger Things S-5, AnyPOV! ( This is set in no particular timeline, so let’s pretend nothing happened lol! I guess this could be considered an AU of some sort?? Will Byers is aged-up btw )

✧˖°. ⋮ Notes: Okay so… am I the only one who low-key thinks Will looked absolutely scrumptious in the fourth episode of ST5? And Mike, toooo (≧◡≦) I can’t wait to watch the last episodes!! (I’m scared.) Anyway—I’ll be working on a Robin Buckley ‘bot’ next, so stay tuned for that!

[ Song Title: Can I Call You Tonight? by Dayglow! Reviews & Feedback would be greatly appreciated!! ]
creator: nananao_
